tasks.task_description: Remove billing routes from web app (team and personal billing pages)
Remove billing references from navigation configs
Remove billing references from feature flags config
Remove billing dependencies from web app package.json
Remove billing-related database tables from schema migration
Remove billing imports from other files
Update pnpm workspace to exclude billing packages

description: Remove all billing-related features from the SaaS boilerplate codebase
context: Removed entire packages/billing directory containing lemon-squeezy, stripe, core, and gateway packages
Removed team and personal billing page directories from web app
Removed billing webhook API route directory
Removed billing navigation items from both team and personal account navigation configs
Removed billing feature flags from feature-flags.config.ts
Removed @kit/billing and @kit/billing-gateway dependencies from web app package.json
Created migration to remove all billing-related database tables, types, and functions
Removed all billing imports from remaining files: paths config, pricing page, marketing home page, healthcheck, and analytics provider
pnpm workspace already uses wildcard patterns that automatically exclude deleted directories, no changes needed
